description: Cololejeunea calcarea is a species of liverwort belonging to the family Lejeuneaceae.
Lejeunea cavifolia is a species of liverwort belonging to the family Lejeuneaceae.
Lejeunea patens is a small leafy liverwort in the family Lejeuneaceae. It is found in the northern hemisphere. It grows on wet rock faces in temperate rainforests and other areas of high rainfall.
Marchesinia mackaii, or MacKay's pouncewort, is a species of leafy liverwort.
